action.hypothesis: `two_stage_residual` has stalled at the matched `K=128, EF=12, signum, LR=2.0e-3` anchor after several clean recipe checks and three weaker simple-family probes. A single matched probe on `lowrank_two_stage_residual` is the highest-value architecture question now: it preserves the same staged static-library decomposition contract while adding a stronger coarse low-rank trunk. If it cannot beat or clearly pressure the current `two_stage_residual` anchor under the exact same recipe, then the added coarse-path complexity is not worth continuing in this regime.
action.summary: Run one matched architecture probe by switching only `ARCHITECTURE` to `lowrank_two_stage_residual` while keeping the current `two_stage_residual` reference recipe fixed at `K=128`, `EXPANSION_FACTOR=12`, `OPTIMIZER=signum`, `LR=2.0e-3`, and baseline aux settings. This answers one question only: whether a stronger low-rank coarse stage is worth revisiting at all, or whether the simpler `two_stage_residual` should remain the active LUTurbo-aligned mainline.
action.self_review: This is policy-clean: one matched architecture probe, one primary variable, and `EXPANSION_FACTOR=12` is explicitly pinned. The main tradeoff is that `lowrank_two_stage_residual` likely raises online coefficient cost versus the current mainline, so it is only worth continuing if the FVU gain is material rather than marginal. I am choosing it over another simple selector family because recent matched probes already showed that lighter alternatives are clearly behind the current anchor.
notes_to_memory: Round 78 uses the single allowed matched architecture probe on `lowrank_two_stage_residual` against the exact `two_stage_residual` K128/EF12/signum/LR=2.0e-3 anchor.

Interpretation rule: because `lowrank_two_stage_residual` adds online coarse-path compute, only a clear reconstruction win justifies future follow-up; a near-tie should still count against reopening this family.
next_hypotheses: Return to the `two_stage_residual` mainline next round regardless, per the operator instruction.
If `lowrank_two_stage_residual` wins clearly, schedule exactly one clean confirmation round on that family before any LR or optimizer tuning.
If it loses or is only marginally better, treat the current stall as evidence that stronger coarse-trunk complexity is not the right next direction under the K128/EF12 LUTurbo-aligned regime.
